## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and refine the approach for analyzing and presenting client data, focusing on a specific case (Jason's company).](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Call Intel tool needs refinement to better highlight client priorities and key insights](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Client (Jason) values thought leadership, brand image, and high-quality content over mass content production](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Team facing challenges with process execution and time zone coordination](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Weekly training sessions (2 hours) proposed to address team efficiency and understanding of manual work](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

## Topics

### Client Analysis Approach

  - [Marcel experimented with SEMrush for initial analysis](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Created performance reports and basic audits](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Key observations:](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
      - [11,000 backlinks, but low authority suggests poor quality](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
      - [Flat traffic trends](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
      - [90% of traffic is branded, not to homepage](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
      - [Potential indexing issues (only 79 pages indexed)](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)
  - [Used ChatGPT to process call notes and generate insights](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Client (Jason) Priorities

  - [Emphasis on not disrupting existing website](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [High importance on design quality](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Large network for outreach](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [AI marketing focus, acquiring agencies to use their platform](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [$80 million/year revenue potential](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Jason is an influencer, active on LinkedIn](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Prioritizes brand, presentation, and engaging, well-written content](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [More interested in thought leadership than mass content production](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

### Tool Refinement

  - [Call Intel tool needs improvement](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Suggestion to add "Here's what we heard" or "Here's what's important to Jason" sections](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Focus on contextualizing insights for kickoff calls](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Need to highlight client's stated priorities and concerns](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Discussed audience competitors vs. direct competitors](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Many identified competitors are audience competitors](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Noted the client is in a new category, making direct comparisons challenging](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)

### Team Challenges

  - [Issues with process execution and understanding of manual work](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Time zone coordination problems affecting workflow](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [Frustration with team members not taking initiative or being too "sloppy"](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Consideration of role specialization (e.g., dedicated competitive research, content creation, or image production)](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Refine Call Intel tool prompt to better highlight client priorities and key insights](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Implement weekly 2-hour training sessions to improve team efficiency and understanding](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Review and potentially adjust team structure and responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Continue to develop and refine the client analysis approach, focusing on high-quality, brand-aligned insights](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Address time zone coordination issues to improve workflow](https://fathom.video/share/VTK8VihvPy5gLijHSfb3hYGf2gF8xE73?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
